```esql
ROW emp_no = [10001, 10002, 99999]
| MV_EXPAND emp_no
| WHERE emp_no IN (FROM employees | KEEP emp_no)
| SORT emp_no
```

| emp_no:integer |
| --- |
| 10001 |
| 10002 |
